commit.message:
fix(security): API security hardening (#89)

* fix(security): API security - rate limiting, sanitize errors, hide system prompt (fixes #83, fixes #84, fixes #85)

- Add shared in-memory rate limiter (30 req/min per IP) applied to all AI endpoints
- Require SWA authentication on /api/converse, /api/playground, /api/action, /api/generate
- Strip system prompt from /api/converse responses (was exposed on new sessions)
- Replace raw error messages with generic client-safe errors across all handlers
- Log full error details server-side only (with stack traces)
- Add shared error-response utility for consistent error handling

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(security): add rate limiting to inspirations, use auth principal for rate-limit key

- staticwebapp.config.json: require authenticated role for /api/inspirations
- rate-limiter.ts: key by SWA x-ms-client-principal-id (trusted) instead of
  spoofable IP headers; fall back to IP only when no auth principal available
- rate-limiter.ts: add global backstop bucket (300 req/min) as aggregate
  abuse prevention regardless of per-client key

Addresses Zapp security review on PR #89.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
slides: fix wrap problem explanation - children array reference issue

The real issue: only the ID reference in children array is removed/added.
CRDT list merge causes duplicates or missing references. Deterministic
wrapper ID pattern (wrapper-\) was fragile workaround.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Security: add WebSocket token auth, origin check, localhost binding

- Generate random 256-bit session token at startup
- Inject token into index.html via <meta> tag (only served page gets it)
- WS verifyClient rejects connections without valid token
- WS verifyClient rejects non-localhost origins (CSRF protection)
- Bind server to 127.0.0.1 (not accessible from network)
- Frontend reads token from meta tag and passes on WS connect

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
power: fix MTK suspend PSCI state handling

Translate MTK cpuidle mode IDs to the matching PSCI power_state values so suspend paths no longer pass raw logical IDs to firmware.

In PSCI suspend handling, support both cpuidle index and direct power_state safely, track per-CPU state table count, validate direct states, and route loses-context direct states through cpu_suspend() to preserve context save/restore semantics.

This stabilizes deep suspend entry paths that were rebooting after non-boot CPUs were powered down.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(scripts): resolve filelist paths to absolute before xrun invocation

xrun resolves paths inside -f filelists relative to CWD, not relative
to the filelist location. All three filelists (MPTDC, TOP, VIP) use
paths relative to their own directory, causing FILEMIS errors when
xrun is invoked from a different directory.

Add resolve_flist.sh helper that expands relative-path filelists into
absolute-path temp files. All runner scripts now generate these before
invoking xrun.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Replace Semver NuGet package with internal SmolSemVer implementation (#16033)

* Replace Semver NuGet package with internal SmolSemVer implementation

The Semver 3.0.0 NuGet package depends on Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives
5.0.1 which has an expired author certificate, breaking NuGet signature
verification in CI deployment tests (TypeScript AppHost scenarios).

This replaces the external Semver dependency with SmolSemVer, a minimal
zero-dependency SemVer 2.0.0 implementation in src/Shared/SmolSemVer.cs
that uses Span<T> for allocation-free parsing.

Changes:
- Add src/Shared/SmolSemVer.cs with SemVersion type, SemVersionStyles enum,
  and expressive comparison methods (IsNewerThan, IsOlderThan, IsAtLeast,
  HasSamePrecedenceAs)
- Add tests/Aspire.SmolSemVer.Tests with 182 tests including compatibility
  validation against the original Semver package
- Remove Semver PackageReference from Aspire.Hosting and Aspire.Cli
- Replace all using Semver with SmolSemVer across 44 files
- Replace raw int comparisons with expressive methods at all call sites

Fixes #15222

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address PR feedback: add test project to slnx, fix docs

- Add Aspire.SmolSemVer.Tests to Aspire.slnx
- Fix remarks: 'allocation-free' -> 'minimize allocations'
- Fix comment: align metadata validation description with implementation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address review: remove Semver package entirely, add constructor validation, spec-based tests

- Remove Semver PackageReference from test project and PackageVersion from
  Directory.Packages.props — fully eliminates the problematic package
- Replace compatibility tests (which referenced Semver) with hardcoded
  expected values based on the stable SemVer 2.0.0 specification
- Add constructor validation: reject negative version components and
  invalid prerelease/metadata strings
- Organize tests by SemVer 2.0.0 spec rule (Rules 2, 9, 10, 11)
- Add test cases for spec examples including 1.0.0-x-y-z.-- and
  1.0.0+21AF26D3----117B344092BD

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Normalize Razor Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor version

Roslyn does not define , so the merged Razor Directory.Packages.props should carry the source repo's explicit lower-bound package version for Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Razor instead of restoring without a version. This keeps the fix local to Razor's merged package setup and clears the NU1604 warning without changing Roslyn's central infrastructure.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix #54: Reduce lock contention in engine.StoreTransaction

- Copy subscriber slice under the lock, then release lock before broadcasting
- Prevents mutex from being held during potentially slow channel sends
- Follows same pattern as breakpoints.Manager
- Improves concurrency and reduces blocking on other engine operations

commit.message:
chore(deps): TypeScript を v5.9.3 から v6.0.2 へアップグレード (#2438)

* chore(deps): TypeScript を v5.9.3 から v6.0.2 へアップグレード

- package.json: typescript を 5.9.3 → 6.0.2 に更新
- tsconfig.json: rootDir を明示追加 (outDir 使用時の必須化対応)
- tsconfig.json: ignoreDeprecations "6.0" を追加 (moduleResolution Node / baseUrl の非推奨化対応)
- tsconfig.json: types に "node" と "jest" を明示追加 (TypeScript 6.0 の @types 自動解決変更への対応)
- src/main.ts: main 関数をエクスポート化し IIFE を削除 (テスト時の意図しないサーバー起動を防止)
- src/cli.ts: CLI エントリーポイントを新規作成 (main 関数を呼び出す)
- package.json: start / dev スクリプトを src/cli.ts に変更

Closes #2404

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: コードレビュー指摘事項を自動修正

- src/cli.ts: IIFE に JSDoc ブロックコメントを追加
- src/main.ts: app.listen() をコールバック形式から Promise/await 形式に変更し、起動エラーが呼び出し元の catch に伝播するよう修正

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): error as Error 型アサーションを instanceof チェックに変更

catch 節で error が Error インスタンスでない場合 (string 等) があるため、
instanceof で確認してから渡すよう修正。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: エントリポイントを main.ts に統合

cli.ts の IIFE を main.ts の末尾に移動し、cli.ts を削除する。
start/dev スクリプトも main.ts を指すよう更新する。

commit.message:
Fix #33: Limit request/response body buffering to prevent OOM

- Add configurable max_body_size_mb setting (default 32 MB)
- Wrap request/response bodies with http.MaxBytesReader in both HTTP and TLS proxies
- Return 413 Request Entity Too Large when limit exceeded
- Prevents denial of service attacks via unbounded body buffering

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add gen_html.py and regenerate index.html with full MVC study guide

Adds a Python generator script (gen_html.py) that builds a complete
single-page study guide covering:
- §10.4 Conic Sections (parabolas, ellipses, hyperbolas — 15 problems)
- §11.1 3D Coordinates & Spheres (8 problems)
- §11.2 Vectors (8 problems)
- §11.3 Dot Product & Projections (6 problems)
- §11.4 Cross Product (8 problems)
- §11.5 Lines in 3-Space (8 problems)
- §11.6 Planes (7 problems)
- §11.7 Quadric Surfaces (7 problems)
- §11.8 Cylindrical & Spherical Coordinates (7 problems)
- §13.1 Functions of Two Variables (9 problems)

Features: sticky nav with section tabs, collapsible key-concepts boxes,
MathJax for LaTeX rendering, Plotly CDN, Google Fonts (DM Serif Display,
DM Sans, Space Mono), full CSS variable theming.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Fix pandas install for Python 3.14 (use binary wheel)
- Add login retry with exponential backoff + TOTP timing guard
- Add session tracking + auto-refresh via generateToken()
- Load instrument master via HTTP (195K instruments)
- Build expiry registry from actual NFO data (218 symbols)
- Add lookup_instrument() for NSE equity -EQ suffix
- Normalize timestamps to tz-naive UTC throughout pipeline
- Fix ADX calc (60-day window for sufficient data points)
- Batch LTP via getMarketData() - 50 tokens per call
- Batch FULL market data for OI + volume in option chains
- Limit option chain to +/-10 strikes around ATM
- Batch spot price and position LTP fetching
- Add rate-limit retry on historical candle fetching
- Wire all 9 previously dead strategies in main.py
- Add NIFTY chain caching to avoid duplicate API calls
- Fix oi_reversal keyword matching
- Sanitize .env.example (remove real credentials)
- Update .gitignore for logs/ and data/instruments.json

string デフォルト値を渡した場合に string 型を返すオーバーロードを追加し、
リテラル型への過剰な推論（TS2367 / no-unnecessary-condition）を防ぐ。
不要な型アサーション (as string) も合わせて除去する。

commit.message:
test(resolver): cover lockfile-pin conflict in backtrack_and_retry

Add a unit test that exercises the True branch of the same-major
activation check inside backtrack_and_retry (resolver/mod.rs L391).

Scenario: a lockfile pin at skill-a@1.0.0 pre-populates the activated
map. The root requirement is ^1.1, so the pin doesn't satisfy it.
Candidates [1.2.0, 1.1.0] both share major 1 with the pin; each
backtrack iteration hits the existing-pin check, finds the pin still
doesn't satisfy ^1.1, and continues — exhausting all choices and
returning Err(Conflict).

Before: 93.00% branch coverage (142 missed)
After:  93.10% branch coverage (140 missed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(#15): fix title generation — reuse existing session, tighter prompt

LiteRT only supports one session at a time. generateOnce() was calling
engine.createConversation() which threw FAILED_PRECONDITION because the
main chat session was already open.

Fix: reuse the existing conversation field instead of creating a new one.

Also improved title extraction:
- Embed directive in the prompt itself (system prompt has no effect on
  existing conversations)
- Post-process to strip 'How about:' preamble, ** markdown, quotes,
  trailing punctuation and alternative suggestions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Phase 4-6: Python layer hardening — fallbacks, observability, validation

Eager fallback:
- BridgedCUDAGraph: try/except on capture_begin/end and replay,
  auto-falls back to eager via model_fn if provided
- ShapeBucketPool: per-bucket capture failure tracking, eager fallback
- ConditionalGraph: per-branch failure tracking, eager fallback

VRAM safety:
- ShapeBucketPool checks torch.cuda.mem_get_info before capture
- Configurable cap via GFXGRAPH_VRAM_CAP env (default 80%)
- Lazy bucket instantiation (warmup=False default)

Validation mode:
- gfxgraph.enable(validate=True) or GFXGRAPH=validate
- BridgedCUDAGraph compares graph output vs eager with torch.allclose
- Catches PyTorch #155684 (HIP Graph correctness bugs)

Observability:
- Thread-safe counter tracking (capture, replay, fallback, validation)
- avg_replay_us rolling average
- HGB_LOG_LEVEL=debug|info|warn|error structured logging
- health_check: VRAM reporting, output correctness verification

Input validation:
- Tensor device (CUDA not CPU), contiguity warnings
- model_fn callable check, type validation on all public APIs

Error propagation:
- _C.py: call_native() helper with return code logging
- GFXGRAPH_LIB env override for .so path
- All HIP return codes surfaced to Python layer

Bump to v0.3.0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove Razor ProjectSystem.SDK refs

Microsoft.VisualStudio.LanguageServices.Razor already checks in its generated ProjectSystem rule files for Core MSBuild, so the merged Roslyn tree does not need Razor's local Microsoft.VisualStudio.ProjectSystem.SDK package or its pinned 17.14.143 version. Removing those Razor-specific entries lets restore defer to Roslyn's existing ProjectSystem packages and avoids the NU1109 downgrade.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: RepoMerger
repository.description: Tool to merge one GitHub repo into another

commit.message:
fix(slugs): prevent crawler merge from overwriting translated slugs

Three fixes for slug stability across all 94+ crawlers:

Bug A (root cause): mergeLocaleTextMap without sourceLocale used
"longer wins" heuristic, letting English-derived slugs (with hash
suffixes) overwrite properly translated locale slugs. Changed to
"existing wins" — b only fills gaps, never overwrites a.
hardenJobLocaleFields still propagates fresh base titles to the
source locale, so title updates are not blocked.

Bug B: regenerate-slugs-by-locale.mjs updated slugByLocale.it
without syncing job.slug (master). The stale master caused
cleanPreviousSlugsPerLocale to incorrectly remove the old IT
slug from previousSlugsByLocale. Now also updates job.slug when
the IT slug changes.

Data fix: Recovered TSMG job master slug — synced to translated
IT slug and captured old English-derived slug in previousSlugs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
